title: Merge Conflict Resolution - helix-cli
description: Resolved conflicts between ticket branch (org/tickets features) and staging branch (update/auto-update features)

steps.title: Merged imports from both branches
steps.description: Combined ticket imports (runOrg, runTickets) with staging imports (getPackageVersion, runUpdate, checkAutoUpdate) so all CLI commands are available.

steps.title: Merged usage help text
steps.description: Added staging's update command help lines alongside existing org/tickets help text.

steps.title: Merged switch cases for all commands
steps.description: Kept ticket's org and tickets cases, added staging's update case, and used getPackageVersion() for dynamic version output.

steps.title: Merged HxConfig type fields
steps.description: Combined ticket's orgId/orgName fields with staging's autoUpdate/installSource fields in the shared config type.

steps.title: Used staging's read-merge-write saveConfig
steps.description: Chose staging's generic read-merge-write pattern over ticket's field-specific write. This approach automatically handles all config fields without explicit enumeration.
